title: Silver Stream
cover_prompt: a single gentle curved line of warm gold on deep muted blue, blurred at the edges like a distant wave, floating in vast negative space
lyrics:
[verse]
Rock-a-bye, rock-a-bye
Moonlight paints the sky so wide
Starlight hums a silver tune
Gentle waves will rock you soon

[verse]
Up we sail on dreams so deep
Soft the clouds will guard your sleep
Waves will sway and stars will gleam
Rock you safe in silver stream

[chorus]
Rock-a-bye, sweet starlight sway
Lullaby will guide your way
Rock-a-bye, drift far away

[verse]
Night will wrap you warm and tight
Close your eyes and feel the light
Starlight sings a soft goodnight
Rock-a-bye, rock-a-bye

[chorus]
Rock-a-bye, sweet starlight sway
Lullaby will guide your way
Rock-a-bye, drift far away

Rock-a-bye, goodnight
style_prompt: Traditional cradle song, warm maternal female vocal, harp arpeggios, 6/8 time signature, 64 BPM, swaying rocking rhythm, gentle lilting motion, the feeling of being carried and rocked, celtic lullaby influence, repetitive swinging pattern, soft piano accompaniment
